summary: When a migration backfills a FK column (e.g. `UPDATE scanner_configs SET universe_id = 1`), ensure the referenced row exists BEFORE the UPDATE by inserting it with `ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING` — CI databases start empty (no seed SQL applied), so the FK constraint will fail if the parent row is absent. See migration `c7d8e9f0a1b2` for the pattern.
